Frequently Asked Questions

DocReady is strictly designed to get your files under the SARS 5MB limit.
Yes, we process everything locally in your browser.
Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any point.
We accept credit cards and EFT via PayFast.
No, there is no expiration date on your credits.
Only your browser limits how large a file you can upload.
